# SBA Borrower Bankruptcy - Loan Discharge Guide [2026]
> Can you file bankruptcy on SBA loans? Personal guarantees, collateral, and discharge options for SBA borrowers. 2026 guide.

## About
saborrowerbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- SBA Borrower Bankruptcy - Loan Discharge Guide: https://saborrowerbankruptcy.com/
- Privacy Policy: https://saborrowerbankruptcy.com/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
